item.title: Fertilizers & Chemicals Travancore Ltd Opens Strong with Significant Gap Up on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Fertilizers & Chemicals Travancore Ltd (F A C T) commenced trading on 11 Mar 2026 with a notable gap up, opening 5.41% higher than its previous close. This strong start underscores a positive market sentiment amid a backdrop of recent gains and sector outperformance. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd Hits Intraday High with 11.62% Surge on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 299.9, marking an 11.62% increase. This strong rally outpaced the broader Gas sector and the Sensex, reflecting notable trading momentum amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 458, reflecting a 5.48% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: NIBE Ltd Hits Intraday High with 9.84% Surge on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: NIBE Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging by 9.84% to touch a day’s high of Rs 1024.8. This notable gain outpaced the Aerospace & Defense sector by 3.12% and contrasted sharply with the broader market’s subdued tone, as the Sensex declined by 0.36%. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: GAIL (India) Ltd Hits Intraday High with 3.03% Surge on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: GAIL (India) Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 153.7, marking a 2.33% increase from its previous close. This upward movement reflects a notable 3.03% gain on the day, outperforming its sector and broader market indices amid a generally subdued market environment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Jai Balaji Industries Ltd Hits Intraday High with 14.78% Surge on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Jai Balaji Industries Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 69.55, marking a significant 14.78% increase. item.title: Ion Exchange (India) Ltd Hits Intraday High with 9.23% Surge on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Ion Exchange (India) Ltd demonstrated robust intraday strength on 11 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 376.5, marking a 9.29% increase from the previous close. This strong performance outpaced its sector and broader market indices amid a generally subdued market environment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Gas Ltd. Surges to Intraday High with 11.08% Gain on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Gujarat Gas Ltd. recorded a robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging 11.08% to touch a day’s high of Rs 414.15. This significant rally outpaced the Gas sector’s gain of 3.11% and marked a notable deviation from the broader market’s subdued trend. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd Opens Strong with Significant Gap Up on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd commenced trading today with a significant gap up, opening 8.29% higher than its previous close, signalling a robust start amid positive market sentiment. item.title: Va Tech Wabag Ltd Opens Strong with Significant Gap Up Amid Positive Market Sentiment
item.description: Va Tech Wabag Ltd commenced trading today with a significant gap up, opening 8.25% higher than its previous close, signalling robust positive sentiment in the Other Utilities sector. item.title: Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd Opens with Strong Gap Up, Reflecting Positive Market Sentiment
item.description: Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd witnessed a significant gap up at the opening bell on 11 Mar 2026, surging 9.74% above its previous close. This strong start underscores a positive market sentiment amid a broader sectoral gain, with the stock outperforming its industrial manufacturing peers and the Sensex benchmark. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Ceinsys Tech Ltd Opens Strong with Significant Gap Up on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Ceinsys Tech Ltd commenced trading on 11 Mar 2026 with a significant gap up, opening 6.3% higher than its previous close, signalling robust positive sentiment in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. This strong start was accompanied by an intraday high surge of 15.42%, underscoring notable momentum in the stock’s price action. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: R Systems International Ltd Opens with Significant Gap Down Amid Market Concerns
item.description: R Systems International Ltd witnessed a sharp gap down at the opening bell on 11 Mar 2026, reflecting heightened market concerns and a notable shift in investor sentiment. The stock opened at a loss of 5.01%, underperforming its sector and broader market indices as it faced selling pressure early in the session. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Shakti Pumps (India) Ltd Opens with Strong Gap Up, Reflecting Positive Market Sentiment
item.description: Shakti Pumps (India) Ltd commenced trading on 11 Mar 2026 with a significant gap up, opening 8.21% higher than its previous close, signalling robust positive sentiment in the Compressors, Pumps & Diesel Engines sector. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, registering a day change of 15.10%, underscoring a strong start to the trading session. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs.2145.9
item.description: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd, a key player in the Aerospace & Defence sector, reached an all-time high of Rs.2145.9 on 11 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its market journey. This peak reflects the company’s robust performance and sustained upward momentum over multiple timeframes. Time: 23 minutes ago
